name: Wii Startup Disc
description: A Non-Game Disc that installed the Wii System Menu and at the time it was packed with all Wii Consoles and was One-Use only. Even before Wii Sports, this was the first ever Wii Disc that wasnt released to the public. And is now Partially Found.

name: Wii Sports
description: A collection of motion-controlled sports games including Tennis, Bowling, Baseball, Boxing, and Golf. Bundled with most Wii consoles and widely credited for the system's global success.
